canonical_definition: An evaluation procedure using artificially generated data to test model properties under controlled conditions, such as the dirty-label backdoor attack setup used in the paper's experiments.
papers: Backdoor Attacks in Token Selection of Attention Mechanism
In-Context Deep Learning via Transformer Models
